root_cause_hypothesis: Golden RE-CAPTURE run, so golden_match is self-referential and proves nothing on its own; the load-bearing evidence is the live chain walk. The 2026-06-30 golden emitted <AxSecurityRolePermissionSet>/<AxSecurityRoleDutyPermission>, which the metadata deserializer discards: the duty and role compiled clean and granted nothing, so the golden could never fail on the thing the case exists to catch. Re-running the real create path on the merged fix (PR #735) emits <AxSecurityPrivilegeReference>/<AxSecurityDutyReference>; the data-entity path also now honours primaryTable/fields, so the entity no longer needs the hand-written xmlContent workaround.
suggested_fix_area: none - the writers are correct; the goldens were the stale artifact
evidence_refs: security_info(duty=ConDemoNoteHeaderDuty) -> Privileges (1): ConDemoNoteHeaderMaintain; Assigned to Roles (1): ConDemoNoteHeaderRole
xppc Contoso: Errors 0 (only the pre-existing PricingEngine ExternalReference warning)
xppbp Contoso: 0 warnings on all five artifacts
entity DataManagementEnabled is No, not Yes: the old golden pointed DataManagementStagingTable at ConDemoNoteHeaderEntityStaging, which does not exist in the fixture model
